英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradford於1338年出生在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。她於大約1355年與Robert Wetewode在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1442年在她的家鄉享年104歲，埋葬在英國波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradford于1338年出生在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。她于大约1355年与Robert Wetewode在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1442年在她的家乡享年104岁，埋葬在英国波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places, large and small, called Bradford; in particular the city in Yorkshire, which originally rose to prosperity as a wool town. There are others in Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Greater Manchester, Norfolk, Somerset, Cheshire, Wiltshire and elsewhere. They are all named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + ford ‘ford’.

History: This name was brought independently to North American by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Bradford (1590–1657), born in Austerfield in South Yorkshire, England, the son of a yeoman farmer, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who emigrated to North America on the Mayflower in 1620. He was a signer of the Mayflower Compact and in 1621 he was elected governor of Plymouth colony, being re-elected thirty times. Another William Bradford (1663–1752), printer, came from Barnwell, Leicestershire, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in 1685, subsequently moving to New York, where he set up a printing press and founded a paper mill. His grandson, also called William Bradford (1721–91), was known as ‘the patriot printer’, famous for his Philadelphia newspaper, which among other things denounced the Stamp Act, "which no American can mention without abhorrence".

variants.name: Braford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Brafford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradford was born in 1338, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Wetewode about 1355, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1442, in her hometown, at the age of 104, and was buried in Cumberland, England.

Elle a épousé Robert Wetewode environ 1355, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 104 ans, et a été enterrée à Cumberland, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradfordは1338年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた。約1355年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでRobert Wetewodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1442年に故郷で104歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradford(은)는 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Robert Wetewode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 그녀의 고향에서 104세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Wetewode aproximadamente 1355, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradford родилась в 1338 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wetewode около 1355 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1442 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 104 лет и была похоронена в местности кумбирланд, Англия.
